description: Convert 5 views flagged by Supabase linter from SECURITY DEFINER to SECURITY INVOKER to enforce proper RLS.

userStories.title: Convert 5 SECURITY DEFINER views to SECURITY INVOKER
userStories.description: As a security-conscious developer, I want all views to use SECURITY INVOKER so that RLS policies are enforced for the querying user, not the view creator.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration sets security_invoker=on for contracts_active, lots_active, buildings_active, lots_with_contacts, activity_logs_with_user
Migration applies cleanly via supabase db push --linked
Supabase linter no longer flags these 5 views
userStories.notes: Single migration using ALTER VIEW SET (security_invoker = on). No DROP/RECREATE needed.
